subject: low turnout idea - Sunday workshop
snippet: Only a couple dozen signed up so far. Quick idea to fill seats...
body:
Hey Barbara,

Only a couple dozen signed up so far and I really want a full room. You have access to all those diabetic patients at Greenleaf - can you pull their phone numbers and text them an invite for Sunday? Even just the folks on metformin. It is for their own good and nobody will mind. Just this once.

Denise

subject: Your workshop supplies quote (attached)
snippet: Quote NPM-2026-1014 attached. Let us know if you'd like to proceed...
body:
Hi Barbara,

Attached is the quote for your Oct 18 workshop supplies (handouts, test strips, lancets, name tags, snacks). The total and line items are on the attached PDF. It supersedes the verbal estimate from last month. Reply or call to confirm and we will have it ready for pickup Saturday.

Northland Print & Medical Supply

subject: Re: Nov 21 screening logistics
snippet: For the November screening, not this Sunday - volunteer sheet to follow...
body:
Barbara,

This is about the November 21 screening event, not the Sunday workshop. I will send the volunteer sheet next week. No action needed from you yet.

Faith

subject: Practice exam #4 unlocks this week
body: Reminder: your next full-length practice exam is available. Good luck with your prep.

subject: can you grab my refill
snippet: Metformin refill ready at the pharmacy...
body: Mija, my metformin refill is ready. Can you pick it up after work? Love, Mom.

subject: Weekly bulletin
body: This week at Grace Community: service at 10, fellowship lunch after, prayer list attached.
